productDisplayName: Nike Women Trainng Grey Track Pant
description: Composition Grey track pants made of 88% recycled polyester and 12% spandex Dri Fit fabric, has a wide waist band, swoosh logo printed in black on the left of the band, and regular fit legs with slight flare below the knee Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash cold with like colours Do not use softeners or bleach Do not iron or dry clean Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Feel great while you exercise for even more reasons when wearing these track pants from nike. The Dri-Fit fabric wicks sweat away from your body keeping you dry, while the wide waistband and shape offers a flattering fit, making your legs look great. Best of all, at least 70% of the material used to manufacture these pants are generated from waste. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and waist 28"
